patch.comment: narrowMetaFromEvent surfaces a diagnostic sender_union_id from the inbound event; it is observability-only and never used for access matching (issue #102)
Expose structured inbound resources and a raw message-resource fetch seam for channel-owned attachment handling.
Adopt the shared @excitedjs/eslint-config flat config and the synchronous-blocking-IO lint gate (issue #85); no runtime change

minor.comment: Add an explicit, additive `logger?` option to `FeishuTransportOptions` (a package-owned minimal `TransportLogger` interface) so a host can fold the transport's own diagnostics — Lark SDK logging, WebSocket connection lifecycle, and best-effort doc-comment/metadata/bot-info/socket-close failures — into its per-component log. Instance-level: each transport derives its SDK and connection sinks from the injected logger. With no logger the historical stderr behavior is preserved byte-for-byte (issue #74).
Export the access-state persistence contract used by host channel gates.

none.comment: Add repository field so npm provenance validation passes on OIDC publish

patch.comment: Add core parsing helpers for Feishu bot-member-added events and mention names.
Thread Feishu replies with outbound targets
